final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing brand promotional poster for RAN QIU, designed for print and social media use with an Eastern-aesthetic, minimalist visual language.

Style/medium: minimalist poster with Eastern aesthetic, natural poetry sensibility, warm-healing tone, generous negative space, shallow depth of field
Composition: ample white space, single focal subject centered or offset with breathing room, shallow depth of field framing
Subject: brand mark "RAN QIU" integrated with natural autumnal elements (dried botanicals, fallen leaves, soft textures)
Scene/backdrop: quiet, poetic autumn atmosphere — understated, serene, no busy backgrounds
Lighting/mood: golden hour warmth, soft diffused light, tranquil and healing
Color palette: #8B3A1E (deep autumn brick-red), #E8DCCB (cream beige), #D4A574 (golden amber-brown); warm tones throughout
Materials/textures: natural paper-like textures, organic botanical surfaces
Text (verbatim): RAN QIU
Constraints: brand colors must dominate; negative space must be generous; no harsh shadows or high-contrast drama; Eastern minimalist restraint throughout
Avoid: busy backgrounds, cold or desaturated tones, Western luxury poster clichés, overcrowded layout, neon or synthetic colors
